Details

Licensed GPL-3.0-only
Created 3 hours ago
Updated 2 hours ago
DescriptionGalleryChangelogVersionsModeration

ModernIndev is a Minecraft modpack thats inspired by the beta era of the game that let's you relive old school Minecraft in modern Minecraft!

Features:

  • Beta world generation. (An option in the world creation screen)
  • Beta Splash Texts.
  • No attack cooldown.
  • Old crosshair.
  • No Mojang Telemetery.
  • Beta-like optimization.
  • Old lightining, battle mechanic, animations, game mechanichs and textures (optional).

  • Minecraft: 1.20.1
  • Modpack Version: 1.0
  • Mod Loaders: Fabric, Forge
